description: Counterparty proposes reasonable advance notice for inspections, accompanied by a representative. This combines two listed acceptable_variations in the inspections topic; no hard_rejection rule applies to this topic today, so there is no detector to hook, but this exercises the ACCEPT / acceptable_variation gold-case category per issue #183.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Institution may inspect the premises upon 48 business hours' advance written notice, accompanied by a representative of the Company.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variations 'specific reasonable advance notice' -> '24-72 business hours' notice' and 'accompanied inspection' -> 'accompanied by a representative'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
